The Age of Adaline (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,629,776Details
International Box Office $26,354,760
Worldwide Box Office $68,984,536
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,880,778
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,767,807
Total $12,648,585
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After miraculously remaining 29 years old for almost eight decades, Adaline Bowman has lived a solitary existence, never allowing herself to get close to anyone who might reveal her secret. But a chance encounter with charismatic philanthropist Ellis Jones reignites her passion for life and romance. When a weekend with his parents threatens to uncover the truth, Adaline makes a decision that will change her life forever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,203,458 (31.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,991 opening theaters/3,070 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $60,480,679

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 24th, 2015 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: April 16th, 2015 (Wide), released as Age of Adaline, The (New Zealand)
April 16th, 2015 (Wide), released as The Age of Adeline (Australia)
April 23rd, 2015 (Wide) (Italy)
April 23rd, 2015 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
April 24th, 2015 (Wide) (Argentina)
Video Release: August 25th, 2015 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for a suggestive comment.
(Rating bulletin 2345, 10/22/2014)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Black and White Sequence, Digital Cinematography, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Geographical setting: San Francisco
Plot point: Blindness, Car Accident, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Immortality, Near Death Experience, Non-Chronological, Romance, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Time period setting: 1900s, 1920s, 1940s, 1950s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Sidney Kimmel Entertainment, Lakeshore Entertainment, Lionsgate
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After miraculously remaining 29 years old for almost eight decades, Adaline Bowman has lived a solitary existence, never allowing herself to get close to anyone who might reveal her secret. But a chance encounter with charismatic philanthropist Ellis Jones reignites her passion for life and romance. When a weekend with his parents threatens to uncover the truth, Adaline makes a decision that will change her life forever.
